name: Greek-Style Macaroni Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Omit the tomatoes without harm.
2. Cook the macaroni according to package instructions.
3. Drain and set aside.
4. Heat oil in a frying pan and fry onion and garlic until soft.
5. Stir in soya mince or Quorn (if using) and chopped tomatoes, and fry for 2-3 minutes.
6. Add spices and herbs, and fry for an additional minute.
7. Remove from heat and stir in cheese and macaroni. Season to taste and transfer to a large square ovenproof dish.
8. Preheat the oven to 400°F/200°C.
9. To make topping, melt butter in a pan, stir in flour and cook for 1 minute.
10. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until sauce thickens.
11. Remove from heat and stir in cheese.
12. Quickly add beaten eggs and yogurt, mix thoroughly, season, then pour over macaroni mixture.
13. Bake for 30 minutes, then allow to cool for a few minutes.
14. Cut into squares and serve with a green salad.
